name: TOEFL Integrated Writing

criteria.name: Accuracy of Content
criteria.description: Correctly conveys the key points from the lecture and how they relate to the reading.

criteria.name: Reading-Lecture Link
criteria.description: Clearly shows how the lecture casts doubt on / supports each point of the reading.

criteria.name: Organization
criteria.description: Well-organized by point; no important information omitted or distorted.

criteria.name: Language Use
criteria.description: Grammar and vocabulary are accurate enough that meaning is always clear.

instructions: A ~20-minute task; strong responses are 150-225 words. The writer's own opinion is NOT required. Reward faithful reporting of the source relationship; penalize copying long strings verbatim, missing points, or misrepresenting the lecture.
